name: Incantation shower gel
description: A bewitching shower gel crafted for Halloween, wrapping you in dark, mysterious, and enchanting scents to cast a spell on your shower routine.
archive_note: A seasonal Halloween Kitchen product, part of Lush's annual witchy autumn lineup.
nostalgia_angle: A spellbinding Halloween Kitchen release that fans eagerly anticipate each autumn season.
throwback_reference: Part of Lush's annual Halloween Kitchen spellbook-themed collection, evoking dark botanical and witchy scent traditions.
